mapper.sql: AND ( j.CLOSE_DT IS NULL OR TRIM(j.CLOSE_DT) = '' OR TRIM(j.CLOSE_DT) IN ('상시채용', '채용시까지') OR TRIM(j.CLOSE_DT) NOT REGEXP '^[0-9]{4}[-.]?[0-9]{1,2}[-.]?[0-9]{1,2}$' OR ( CASE WHEN TRIM(j.CLOSE_DT) REGEXP '^[0-9]{8}$' THEN STR_TO_DATE(TRIM(j.CLOSE_DT), '%Y%m%d') ELSE STR_TO_DATE(REPLACE(TRIM(j.CLOSE_DT), '.', '-'), '%Y-%c-%e') END ) >= CURDATE() )
mapper.select:
SELECT j.WANTED_AUTH_NO AS wantedAuthNo, j.SOURCE AS source, j.SOURCE_TYPE AS sourceType, j.COMPANY AS company, j.TITLE AS title, j.JOBS_NM AS jobsNm, j.JOBS_CD AS jobsCd, j.EMP_TP_NM AS empTpNm, j.CAREER AS career, j.MIN_EDUBG AS minEdubg, j.SAL_AMT AS salAmt, j.SAL_TP_NM AS salTpNm, j.REGION AS region, j.CLOSE_DT AS closeDt, j.WANTED_INFO_URL AS wantedInfoUrl, j.BASIC_ADDR AS basicAddr, j.INFO_SVC AS infoSvc, j.JOB_CAREER_CD AS jobCareerCd, j.JOB_ACDMCR_CD AS jobAcdmcrCd, j.JOB_EMP_TP_CD AS jobEmpTpCd, j.JOB_AREA_CD AS jobAreaCd, j.JOBABA_CMMN_276_CD AS jobabaCmmn276Cd, j.JOBABA_CMMN_274_CD AS jobabaCmmn274Cd, c.LAT AS lat, c.LNG AS lng FROM v_job_posting j INNER JOIN tb_empmn_map_coord c ON j.WANTED_AUTH_NO = c.WANTED_AUTH_NO
ORDER BY CASE WHEN j.CLOSE_DT REGEXP '^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, j.CLOSE_DT ASC, j.REG_DT DESC
ORDER BY j.REG_DT DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM v_job_posting j INNER JOIN tb_empmn_map_coord c ON j.WANTED_AUTH_NO = c.WANTED_AUTH_NO

SELECT j.WANTED_AUTH_NO AS wantedAuthNo, j.SOURCE AS source, j.SOURCE_TYPE AS sourceType, j.COMPANY AS company, j.TITLE AS title, j.JOBS_NM AS jobsNm, j.EMP_TP_NM AS empTpNm, j.CAREER AS career, j.MIN_EDUBG AS minEdubg, j.SAL_AMT AS salAmt, j.SAL_TP_NM AS salTpNm, j.REGION AS region, j.CLOSE_DT AS closeDt, j.WANTED_INFO_URL AS wantedInfoUrl, j.BASIC_ADDR AS basicAddr, j.DETAIL_ADDR AS detailAddr, j.INFO_SVC AS infoSvc, j.JOB_CAREER_CD AS jobCareerCd, j.JOB_ACDMCR_CD AS jobAcdmcrCd, j.JOB_EMP_TP_CD AS jobEmpTpCd, j.JOB_AREA_CD AS jobAreaCd, j.JOBABA_CMMN_276_CD AS jobabaCmmn276Cd, j.JOBABA_CMMN_274_CD AS jobabaCmmn274Cd, c.LAT AS lat, c.LNG AS lng FROM v_job_posting j LEFT JOIN tb_empmn_map_coord c ON j.WANTED_AUTH_NO = c.WANTED_AUTH_NO WHERE j.WANTED_AUTH_NO = #{wantedAuthNo} AND j.USE_YN = 'Y' AND j.DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM v_job_posting WHERE WANTED_AUTH_NO = #{wantedAuthNo} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_empmn_map_coord (WANTED_AUTH_NO, LAT, LNG, GEOCODE_YN, REG_DT) VALUES (#{wantedAuthNo}, #{lat}, #{lng}, #{geocodeYn}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE LAT = #{lat}, LNG = #{lng}, GEOCODE_YN = #{geocodeYn}
